sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3980" key="a)lektruo/nilon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλεκτρυ-όνιλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλεκτρυών</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:15:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.8</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
